texto: Who were these people? Where was all this joy, and where does joy go when it leaves your family? Does it go into someone else's family, soak into the earth, or does it dissolve away like your breath in the winter? And if it doesn't leave like this, then why isn't there any left for me?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Crystal Chan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Who were these people? Where was all this joy, and where does joy go when it leaves your family? …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, bird, grief pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e grief.
